Services

Complete range of
financing solutions, focused on smart intermediation

At Capital Hub Finance, we focus on identifying the most suitable financing solutions for companies. We don't offer standard products, but connect each business with the right partners through an assisted and personalized process.

Services

Complete range of financing solutions

At Capital Hub Finance, we focus on identifying the most suitable financing solutions for companies.

4+

Service Types

24/7

Support

Our working method

Solutions built
for company realities

Personalized

Designed specifically for you

Fast

Accelerated process

Secure

Trusted partner

Expert

Professional team

At Capital Hub Finance, we understand that accessing financing is never just about completing a form.

It's about the context of your business, timing, real needs, and growth direction.

Our role is not to offer you a financial product, but to connect you with the right solution, at the right time, through a simplified and guided process.

Ready to get started?

Let's discuss your financing needs

Core Service

1. Intermediation of financing solutions

This is the core of our activity – where all partnerships begin.

Short-term financing

  • Factoring and reverse factoring
  • Working capital credit lines
  • Supplier credit and commercial loans
  • Microloans for SMEs

Medium and long-term financing

  • Leasing for equipment and vehicles
  • Investment loans
  • Refinancing and restructuring
  • Green financing (solar solutions)

Non-reimbursable funds

  • European funds and NRRP
  • International or private grants
  • Project preparation assistance

Alternative financing

  • Fintech (fast lending)
  • Crowdfunding and crowd-lending
  • Business angels and private investors

Sales & Leaseback (sale with repurchase)

Fast cash-flow solution for companies, by monetizing assets without losing their use

  • immediate liquidity without bank credit
  • continued use of the asset through a leasing contract
  • efficient for periods of financial pressure or restructuring
  • reduces the level of indebtedness compared to a classic loan
  • suitable for financing investments, development and expansion

Optimization of financial-accounting indicators

(carried out by authorized accounting experts, integrated into the financing process)

  • detailed analysis of the company's economic and financial situations
  • identification of elements that affect eligibility or bank scoring
  • professional recommendations for balance sheet adjustment and financial structure improvement
  • financial flow modeling for a correct presentation to financiers
  • Pre-validation of the company for eligibility and approval as well as full compliance with evaluation standards

Financial Consulting

Expert guidance at every step

Consulting

2. Financial consulting
"Gateway" to financing

Access to funds starts with a well-built strategy.

1

We quickly analyze your eligibility and financial context

2

We propose a personalized financing structure

3

We prepare essential documentation (business case, cash flow, company profile)

4

We connect you with the right financiers from our network and provide support in negotiating terms

3. Capital Hub Platform

Subscription-based access to financing and strategic support. Flexibility for you, efficiency for your business.

START

For companies in validation or controlled expansion

  • Single application access
  • Useful guides
POPULAR

GROWTH

For businesses that are accelerating and need recurring solutions

  • Everything in Start
  • Automatic matching
  • Dedicated consultants

PRO

For mature players with complex needs and extended access

  • Priority matchmaking
  • Monthly advisory board
Additional Services

4. Auxiliary services for optimization

Digital Solutions

ERP, invoice automation, cash flow management

Tax Optimization

Specifically adapted to your company needs

Legal Assistance

For financing contracts and partnerships

Accounting

Oriented towards financial eligibility and growth

CAPITAL HUB

Professional financing solutions for companies that want to grow sustainably and efficiently.
